channel.title: October on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in October on My Blog

item.title: Goal
item.description:
Tag: #very_important #Goal

Goal

Develop All essential skills to contribute on open source

  • If you don’t what to develop, Find it find it anyhow
  • Explore new thing
  • Just do it

Things I will absolutely won’t do

  • Wasting my time on anything useless
  • More than 2 hours of daily mobile use

To complete my goals what i need:

  • I definitly won’t slack off
  • I need Courage
  • I need resolve
  • I need prserverence
  • Just trust yourself
